task_completion.description: Verify the StationXML was converted to SeisComP XML format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output (e.g., 'ls' or 'll' commands) or a file manager showing the existence of the file 'iu_ctao_station.scml' in the directory '/home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/inventory/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the station was imported into the MySQL database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands executing the import (e.g., using 'scinv' or 'seiscomp update inventory' targeting 'mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp') or a SeisComP GUI showing the station IU.CTAO successfully loaded into the database.

task_completion.description: Verify the station is visible in the inventory configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output or a file manager confirming the existence of the file 'iu_ctao_station.xml' in the directory '/home/ga/seiscomp/etc/inventory/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the station binding was enabled by creating a key file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output or a file manager confirming the existence of the file 'station_IU_CTAO' in the directory '/home/ga/seiscomp/etc/key/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the station details (Network, Station, Coordinates) match the expected real-world data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output, database query results, or a SeisComP GUI (like scconfig) displaying the station network 'IU', station code 'CTAO', latitude approximately -20.088, and longitude approximately 146.25.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used proper SeisComP utilities to convert and import data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of commands like 'fdsnxml2inv', 'scinv', or the 'scconfig' GUI. The agent should not just use 'touch' or 'echo' to create empty or manually typed files for the .scml or .xml files.

integrity.description: Verify the database import was performed using SeisComP tools rather than raw SQL inserts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no raw 'INSERT INTO' MySQL commands manually typing out the station details to bypass the XML import process.

integrity.description: Verify the agent extracted data from the provided StationXML rather than hardcoding values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent did not manually type the coordinates (-20.088, 146.25) into a text editor to create the inventory files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The station network code is 'IU' and the station code is 'CTAO'. The station's actual coordinates are approximately Latitude -20.088 and Longitude 146.25. The station data must include at least 3 channels (the actual dataset contains over 40 valid channels).
